id.description: The ID of the whitelist entry.

monetary_account_incoming_id.description: The account to which payments will come in before possibly being 'redirected' by the whitelist.

monetary_account_paying_id.description: The account from which payments will be deducted when a transaction is matched with this whitelist.

type.description: The type of the SDD whitelist, can be CORE or B2B.

credit_scheme_identifier.description: The credit scheme ID provided by the counterparty.

counterparty_alias.description: The account to which payments will be paid.

maximum_amount_per_month.description: The monthly maximum amount that can be deducted from the target account.

maximum_amount_per_payment.description: The maximum amount per payment that can be deducted from the target account.

user_alias_created.description: The user who created the whitelist entry.
